questionHtml:
How many electrons are needed when the following half-equation is balanced using the lowest possible whole numbers?

__ NO3– (aq) + __ H+ (aq) + __ e– → __ NO (g) + __ H2O (l)


A.  1

B.  2

C.  3

D.  5

meta.title: How many electrons are needed when the following half-equation is balanced using the lowest possible whole numbers? __ NO3– (aq) + __ H+ (aq) + __ e– → __ NO (g) + __ H2O (l) A. 1
